packets.title: Create OpenTrain AI role-feed worksheet
packets.objective: Create a local worksheet for OpenTrain AI-style role feeds with role type, pay signal, skills, residency, assessment, contract/KYC, volatility, and accept/park decision columns.
allowed_actions: Use public source text already captured in the registry and future read-only public checks if separately approved.
Park any application or assessment route behind account and legal/payment gates.
prohibited_actions: No identity, tax, payment, or contractor-term submission.
packets.done_when: Worksheet exists with at least five role/category rows, gate notes, and a next-action decision.

packets.title: Create Algora explicit-payout issue worksheet
packets.objective: Create a duplicate-aware local worksheet for Algora paid GitHub issues with payout terms, owner route, claim state, testability, repo health, and public-action gates.
allowed_actions: Use public source snapshots and local-only issue triage.
Draft worksheet and candidate scoring criteria.
Park any claim, comment, PR, or payout detail behind service gates.
packets.done_when: Worksheet defines explicit-payout filters, duplicate checks, and at least one safe next local triage command or candidate source.

packets.title: Create EF ESP Wishlist/RFP fit memo
packets.objective: Map EF ESP Wishlist/RFP style opportunities to local prototype candidates, deliverables, timeline, evidence needs, and application gates.
allowed_actions: Draft a local fit memo from public grant/RFP source notes.
Identify prototype ideas that can be built locally before any application.
Keep all proposal commitments behind human approval.
prohibited_actions: No account, KYC, payment, or legal term acceptance.
packets.done_when: Memo ranks at least three grant-fit project ideas and names the smallest local prototype proof for the top one.

packets.title: Create Devpost weekly prize calendar
packets.objective: Create a local weekly prize calendar template for Devpost-style hackathons with deadline, prize, online status, account gate, rules, and first local build artifact.
allowed_actions: Draft local calendar and scoring fields.
Use already captured public source refresh notes.
Queue live refresh behind read-only browser approval if needed.
packets.done_when: Calendar template exists with scoring fields and a rule for when to promote a hackathon into a build sprint.

packets.title: Create ARC Prize 2026 feasibility memo
packets.objective: Create a local feasibility memo for ARC Prize 2026 with rules, public resources, baseline approaches, compute needs, collaboration options, and submission gates.
allowed_actions: Use public rule summaries and local-only reasoning about approach.
Define no-login baseline experiments for future local work.
prohibited_actions: No Kaggle or ARC track join.
packets.done_when: Memo selects one local baseline path and one kill criterion before any account/submission step.

packets.title: Create Upwork AI workflow audit offer packet
packets.objective: Create a local offer packet for AI workflow audits with buyer segment, pain points, deliverables, proof asset, proposal boundaries, and marketplace gates.
allowed_actions: Draft local offer, ICP, deliverables, and proof asset plan.
Use public marketplace demand notes already captured.
Keep profile/proposal/contact work behind approval gates.
packets.done_when: Offer packet includes ICP, three package tiers, one local proof asset, and a non-spam outreach gate.

next_action: Execute the six local proof packets in lane order, starting with OpenTrain role-feed worksheet and Algora explicit-payout worksheet.
